name: How much is my on-the-job injury case worth in South Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: How much is my on-the-job injury case worth in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.description: Value based on medical costs, lost wages (2/3 in Utah), permanent impairment, pain; averages $20K-$100K+ depending on severity. Multipliers for future care.[1] Key factors: doctor ratings, comp rate (Utah 66 2/3% wages), settlement vs. trial. Track all losses, get impairment rating; negotiate post-MMI. Lawyer calculates accurately.
